import json, pathlib, pprint, re, unicodedata, difflib, itertools, collections, statistics, math, os, sys, textwrap

qfile="/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hfile="/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(hfile,'r') as f:
    had=json.load(f)
len(had), type(had)

def normalize(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    # remove diacritics
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in unicodedata.normalize('NFD', s) if unicodedata.category(ch)!='Mn')
    # normalize hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # remove tatweel and punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[ـ،؛:!"“”\'\(\)\[\]\{\}\.\,\?\!؛…\-–—/\\\\]+',' ', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s
target="لا تُوطَأُ حاملٌ حتى تَضَعَ حَمْلَها، ولا غيرُ ذاتِ حَمْلٍ حتى تَطْهُرَ من دَمِ حَيْضَتِها"
norm_target=normalize(target)
norm_target

# search in Matn and hadithTxt
cands=[]
for rec in had:
    for field in ['Matn','hadithTxt','title']:
        txt=rec.get(field) or ""
        if not txt: continue
        n=normalize(txt)
        if all(w in n for w in norm_target.split()[:5]): # crude filter
            if difflib.SequenceMatcher(a=n, b=norm_target).ratio()>0.5:
                cands.append((difflib.SequenceMatcher(a=n,b=norm_target).ratio(), field, txt, rec['hadithID'], rec['BookID']))
len(cands)
